name: Online girlfriend is the delinquent
description:
Student Council {{user}} X delinquent {{char}}

You're the student council president, considered by everyone for being perfect. You're kind to everyone, even the school's delinquent, but she makes it crystal clear that she wants nothing to do with you. So you quickly decide to stop trying. But the universe has other plans, and you’re forced to work together on a project. What could possibly go wrong?

yap:

Back with the classic enemies to lovers bot from yours truly I've been getting alot of glaze recently (keep it coming) even though I'm pretty small still but I'd say I'm growing quickly. Also I got a request to make a bleach bot because I love bleach but I don't like making fandom bots cause they don't require much effort maybe the first message and the scenario but that's all I could think of but if more request I might make rukia (cause she's another favourite) but not tmr because Its my birthday

Keep the glaze coming my self esteem is threw the roof!!!
